'''dachuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackeroonie|smackeroonie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackeroonie|smackeroonie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dachuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæchichith|dæchichith]] || [[word:dæchichij|dæchichij]] || [[word:dæchichish|dæchichish]] || [[word:dæchichi|dæchichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachuchuchuth|dachuchuchuth]] || [[word:dachuchuchuj|dachuchuchuj]] || [[word:dachuchuchush|dachuchuchush]] || [[word:dachuchuchu|dachuchuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachuchuth|dachuchuth]] || [[word:dachuchuj|dachuchuj]] || [[word:dachuchush|dachuchush]] || [[word:dachuchu|dachuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachufchuth|dachufchuth]] || [[word:dachufchuj|dachufchuj]] || [[word:dachufchush|dachufchush]] || [[word:dachufchuf|dachufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachuchuthu|dachuchuthu]] || [[word:dachuchuju|dachuchuju]] || [[word:dachuchushu|dachuchushu]] || [[word:dachuchuku|dachuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachuchuth|dachuchuth]] || [[word:dachuchuj|dachuchuj]] || [[word:dachuchush|dachuchush]] || [[word:dachuchu|dachuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachuchuthul|dachuchuthul]] || [[word:dachuchujul|dachuchujul]] || [[word:dachuchushul|dachuchushul]] || [[word:dachuchukul|dachuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachuchuthuthu|dachuchuthuthu]] || [[word:dachuchujuju|dachuchujuju]] || [[word:dachuchushushu|dachuchushushu]] || [[word:dachuchuku|dachuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachuchuthun|dachuchuthun]] || [[word:dachuchujun|dachuchujun]] || [[word:dachuchushun|dachuchushun]] || [[word:dachuchukun|dachuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachuchuthuoro|dachuchuthuoro]] || [[word:dachuchujuoro|dachuchujuoro]] || [[word:dachuchushuoro|dachuchushuoro]] || [[word:dachuchukuoro|dachuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
